title: Message Authentication Codes and HMAC · Go Semantics Case: Crypto Go Mac Authenticity
summary: A webhook signs concatenated fields with raw SHA-256, reuses an encryption key, compares hex strings, and accepts the same request repeatedly. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mac authenticity increment in replay-resistant HMAC request authenticator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a MAC to provide symmetric origin authentication and integrity while stating its lack of public verifiability and non-repudiation.
Require an authenticated trusted expected digest or MAC/signature when attackers can modify both data and digest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Mac Authenticity · Theory Crypto Go Mac Authenticity
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 4059 during a backup restoration drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to verify a purpose-separated canonical HMAC request with freshness and durable replay rejection; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Mac Authenticity contract for the supplied data.
